title: alpinia scabra
intro: Alpinia scabra, also known as the lesser galangal, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, Zingiberaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to exhibit medicinal properties such as antioxidant and anticancer activities. The health benefits of Alpinia scabra include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and coughs, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Alpinia scabra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
